Excellent service, variety, and prices. I always visit them when I'm on business. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Mala tensión la señora de el autoservicios no me dejo comprar y me dijo que estaba cerrado una maleducada

(Translated by Google)
The lady at the self-service store was rude and wouldn't let me buy anything, telling me it was closed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxOFpTQXJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo que destaca este lugar respecto del resto de la zona es la amplitud horaria. El servicio es bueno lógicamente muy demorado porque las chicas se ven ampliamente superadas por la cantidad de comensales que tienen que atender.

(Translated by Google)
What makes this place stand out from the rest of the area is its long opening hours. The service is good, but understandably very slow because the staff are overwhelmed by the number of customers they have to serve.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1816604170739414549/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxaHRTUlBnEAE
